title: Pigeon Control & Deterrents in Hollis, Queens | $550–$5,000
metaDescription: Professional pigeon control and deterrent services in Hollis, Queens. Humane removal, netting, spikes & cleanup. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Hollis, Queens residents and property owners know that pigeon infestations can damage roofs, gutters, and building facades while creating unsanitary conditions. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive pigeon control and deterrent solutions tailored to Hollis homes and businesses, from single-family residences to multi-unit buildings. Our humane, effective methods protect your property and restore peace of mind.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Hollis and surrounding Queens neighborhoods with proven pigeon control strategies. Our licensed technicians use only humane deterrent methods, including professional-grade netting, spike systems, and wire deterrents, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and ongoing maintenance plans.
localContext: Hollis features a mix of classic single-family homes, attached row houses, and newer residential developments that often attract roosting pigeons on eaves, chimneys, and AC units. Properties near Francis Lewis Boulevard and the Hollis Avenue corridor are particularly susceptible to pigeon problems due to the area's tree-lined streets and accessible roofline perching spots.

faqs.question: How much does pigeon control cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Pigeon control services in Hollis typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and deterrent methods required. A basic spike installation for a small residential area starts around $550, while comprehensive solutions for larger properties with netting, cleanup, and exclusion work can reach $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Hollis properties.

faqs.question: What pigeon deterrent methods work best for Hollis homes?
faqs.answer: For Hollis residential properties, we recommend a combination of bird spikes for ledges and railings, netting for larger roof areas and courtyards, and visual deterrents for gardens and yards. Many Hollis homeowners benefit from chimney caps and vent guards to prevent nesting. Our technicians assess your specific property layout to design the most effective, humane deterrent system.

faqs.question: Are pigeon droppings dangerous to my family's health?
faqs.answer: Yes, pigeon droppings can pose serious health risks as they may carry diseases like histoplasmosis, cryptococcosis, and E. coli. Dried droppings become airborne and can be inhaled, especially dangerous for children, elderly residents, and those with respiratory conditions. Our Hollis pigeon control service includes thorough cleanup and sanitization using professional-grade disinfectants to eliminate health hazards.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to pigeon problems in Hollis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most pigeon control requests in Hollis, Queens. Emergency situations involving aggressive nesting or severe droppings accumulation receive priority scheduling. After your initial call, we typically conduct an on-site inspection within 24-48 hours and can begin installation of deterrent systems immediately following your approval.
